title: EU border delays 'not bearable' over summer, warns airport boss
summary_full: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.
summary_public: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.
